title.en: Network Softwarization: Information Models, Virtualized Access Networks, SDN & NFV (Clause 7 + Annexes A-E)
title.zh: 网络软件化：信息模型、虚拟化接入网、SDN 与 NFV（第 7 章 + 附录 A-E）

blocks.en: Up to now, IEEE Std 802.1CF-2019 has described an access network as if it were built from dedicated boxes. Clause 7, "Network softwarization functions," asks a different question: what if the whole network were software? Clause 7.1 (Introduction) defines softwarization as using a software solution instead of traditional hardware to design, deploy, manage, and maintain a network. The promise is flexibility and speed throughout the network's life cycle. The standard names three pillars of softwarization that this lesson and its annexes unpack: Cloud computing, Software-Defined Networking (SDN), and Network Function Virtualization (NFV). Clause 7.2 then builds an information model of the IEEE 802 access network. An information model represents concepts, relationships, operations, and constraints — it describes the data semantics of a system using classes (kinds of things) and instances (individual things). Clause 7.2.1 (Composition of information model) stresses that this model adds no new information versus earlier clauses; it simply re-presents the same configuration data and statistics in a more condensed, structured form aligned with Clause 6. Three complementary models follow: a session model (operational view), an access network configuration model, and a network management model (both structural views).
blocks.zh: 在此之前，IEEE Std 802.1CF-2019 一直把接入网描述为由专用硬件盒子搭建而成。第 7 章「网络软件化功能」提出了一个不同的问题：如果整张网络都是软件呢？第 7.1 节（引言）将软件化定义为用软件方案取代传统硬件来设计、部署、管理和维护网络，其好处是在网络的整个生命周期中获得灵活性与速度。标准列出了软件化的三大支柱，本课及其附录将逐一展开：云计算、软件定义网络（SDN，Software-Defined Networking）和网络功能虚拟化（NFV，Network Function Virtualization）。随后第 7.2 节为 IEEE 802 接入网构建了一个信息模型。信息模型用于表示概念、关系、操作和约束——它通过类（事物的种类）和实例（具体的个体）来描述系统的数据语义。第 7.2.1 节（信息模型的组成）强调，该模型相对于前面各章并不增添新信息，只是把同样的配置数据与统计信息以更精炼、更有结构的方式重新呈现，并与第 6 章对齐。随后给出三个互补模型：会话模型（运行视角）、接入网配置模型，以及网络管理模型（后两者为结构视角）。

blocks.en: Clause 7.2.2 (Session information model) is the operational heart. A session is what an access network establishes to deliver service to an attached terminal; a Subscription links that terminal's user to a service provider who authorizes resource use. The complete session is composed of pieces that each correspond to a lifecycle phase: Service selection (which provider/network/node), Access link (the radio link configuration), Security association (session key and encryption mode, built during authentication), Datapath (the forwarding path), Service flow (QoS and policy), and Session statistics (accounting and monitoring records). Subclauses 7.2.2.1 through 7.2.2.8 introduce each sub-model in turn and then combine them into one Complete session information model. Two structural models close out 7.2: Clause 7.2.3 (Access network configuration information model) captures what the Network Management System (NMS) pushes at power-up — initialization configuration for the Access Network Control (ANC), the Nodes of Attachment (NAs), and the Backhaul (BH), plus spectrum-sensing statistics — and Clause 7.2.4 (Network management information model) captures the running Fault Diagnostic and Management (FDM) view: alarm lists, link-monitoring, test, and self-check statistics exchanged between ANC and NMS.
blocks.zh: 第 7.2.2 节（会话信息模型）是运行层面的核心。会话（session）是接入网为已接入终端交付服务而建立的实体；订阅（Subscription）则把该终端的用户与授权使用资源的服务提供商关联起来。一个完整会话由若干部分组成，每一部分对应一个生命周期阶段：服务选择（选哪个提供商/网络/节点）、接入链路（无线链路配置）、安全关联（在认证过程中建立的会话密钥与加密模式）、数据通路（转发路径）、服务流（QoS 与策略），以及会话统计（计费与监测记录）。第 7.2.2.1 至 7.2.2.8 小节依次介绍各子模型，最后将它们合并为一个完整会话信息模型。两个结构模型为 7.2 收尾：第 7.2.3 节（接入网配置信息模型）描述接入网上电时网络管理系统（NMS，Network Management System）下发的内容——面向接入网控制（ANC，Access Network Control）、接入节点（NA，Node of Attachment）和回传（BH，Backhaul）的初始化配置，以及频谱感知统计——而第 7.2.4 节（网络管理信息模型）描述运行中的故障诊断与管理（FDM，Fault Diagnostic and Management）视图：在 ANC 与 NMS 间交换的告警列表、链路监测、测试与自检统计。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="140" y="10" width="80" height="26" rx="3"/><text x="180" y="27" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Session</text><rect x="10" y="70" width="90" height="24" rx="3"/><text x="55" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Service select</text><rect x="110" y="70" width="80" height="24" rx="3"/><text x="150" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Access link</text><rect x="200" y="70" width="80" height="24" rx="3"/><text x="240" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Security assoc</text><rect x="10" y="130" width="80" height="24" rx="3"/><text x="50" y="146" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Datapath</text><rect x="100" y="130" width="80" height="24" rx="3"/><text x="140" y="146" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Service flow</text><rect x="190" y="130" width="90" height="24" rx="3"/><text x="235" y="146" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Session stats</text><line x1="180" y1="36" x2="55" y2="70"/><line x1="180" y1="36" x2="150" y2="70"/><line x1="180" y1="36" x2="240" y2="70"/><line x1="180" y1="36" x2="50" y2="130"/><line x1="180" y1="36" x2="140" y2="130"/><line x1="180" y1="36" x2="235" y2="130"/></svg>

caption.en: The session information model (7.2.2): one Session aggregates six sub-models, each matching a lifecycle phase from service selection through accounting statistics.
caption.zh: 会话信息模型（7.2.2）：一个会话聚合六个子模型，分别对应从服务选择到计费统计的各个生命周期阶段。

blocks.en: Clause 7.3 (Virtualized network instantiation) is where softwarization pays off. In dense venues — malls, airports, office towers — many access networks overlap and contend for the same radio resource. Rather than installing separate hardware per operator, a single physical infrastructure is shared by creating a virtualized access network per operator. Clause 7.3.1 (General) defines a virtualized access network as an SDN associated with one service provider, built from Virtualized Network Function (VNF) elements, behaving just like a hardware network; crucially this differs from roaming — each operator gets full control of its own instance rather than guests sharing one network. An Orchestrator does the heavy lifting. Clause 7.3.2 (Roles) names the players: the Orchestrator creates network-function instances, manages life-cycle resources, and authorizes requests from each operator's Operations/Business Support System (OSS/BSS); the virtualized ANC, NA, and BH mirror their physical counterparts but with reduced configurability where they share hardware. Clause 7.3.3 (Use cases) covers instantiating a new virtualized network and dynamically adding or removing NA instances to match coverage and load, while Clause 7.3.4 (Functional requirements) mandates default-parameter creation, per-operator configuration, and multi-service-provider support with unique air-interface identifiers per operator.
blocks.zh: 第 7.3 节（虚拟化网络实例化）正是软件化收获成果之处。在密集场景——商场、机场、写字楼——许多接入网相互重叠，争抢同一无线资源。与其为每个运营商部署独立硬件，不如通过为每个运营商创建一个虚拟化接入网，让单一物理基础设施被共享。第 7.3.1 节（概述）将虚拟化接入网定义为与某个服务提供商关联的一个 SDN，由虚拟化网络功能（VNF，Virtualized Network Function）元素构建，其行为与硬件网络完全一致；关键在于这不同于漫游——每个运营商对自己的实例拥有完全控制权，而非让访客共享同一张网络。繁重工作由编排器（Orchestrator）完成。第 7.3.2 节（角色）列出参与者：编排器负责创建网络功能实例、管理生命周期资源，并对来自各运营商运营/业务支撑系统（OSS/BSS，Operations/Business Support System）的请求进行授权；虚拟化的 ANC、NA 和 BH 与其物理对应物功能一致，但在共享硬件之处可配置性下降。第 7.3.3 节（用例）涵盖实例化新虚拟化网络以及按覆盖与负载动态增删 NA 实例，而第 7.3.4 节（功能需求）规定了以默认参数创建实体、按运营商各自配置，以及支持多服务提供商且每个运营商拥有唯一空口标识。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant OP as Operator OSS/BSS
  participant OR as Orchestrator
  participant NMS
  OP->>NMS: Create and initialize NMS
  OP->>OR: Create AN request
  OR->>NMS: Init AN (ANC + NAs + BH)
  OR-->>OP: Create AN confirm
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant OP as 运营商 OSS/BSS
  participant OR as 编排器
  participant NMS as 网管系统
  OP->>NMS: 创建并初始化 NMS
  OP->>OR: 创建接入网请求
  OR->>NMS: 初始化接入网 (ANC + NA + BH)
  OR-->>OP: 创建接入网确认

blocks.en: Clause 7.3.5 (Network instantiation procedures) spells out the message flows. The instantiation procedure (7.3.5.1) has the operator command its OSS/BSS, which validates a "Create access network request"; the Orchestrator then builds an ANC, the requested NAs, and the backhaul, followed by ordinary initialization per Clause 6.2. The release procedure (7.3.5.2) covers both operator-initiated teardown and the Orchestrator autonomously releasing everything on a fatal failure. Adding an NA (7.3.5.3) and removing an NA (7.3.5.4) match coverage to demand, and updating configuration (7.3.5.5) lets the operator reconfigure within instantiation-time limits — querying the Coordination and Information Service (CIS) when a change might collide with other access networks on the shared infrastructure.
blocks.zh: 第 7.3.5 节（网络实例化流程）详细给出消息流。实例化流程（7.3.5.1）由运营商向其 OSS/BSS 下达指令，后者校验「创建接入网请求」；随后编排器构建一个 ANC、所请求数量的 NA 及回传，再按第 6.2 节进行常规初始化。释放流程（7.3.5.2）涵盖运营商发起的拆除，以及发生致命故障时编排器自主释放全部资源。增加 NA（7.3.5.3）与移除 NA（7.3.5.4）使覆盖与需求相匹配，而更新配置（7.3.5.5）允许运营商在实例化时设定的能力范围内重新配置——当某项变更可能与共享基础设施上的其他接入网冲突时，需向协调与信息服务（CIS，Coordination and Information Service）查询。

blocks.en: Mental model for the annexes: Annex A is the only normative one (it adds requirements). Annexes B-E are informative (helpful context, not mandatory). Annex A = dynamic spectrum; Annex B = how to read the model diagrams; Annex C = SDN deep-dive; Annex D = NFV; Annex E = the bibliography you cite from.
blocks.zh: 理解各附录的心智模型：附录 A 是唯一的规范性附录（增添了要求）。附录 B-E 为资料性附录（提供有用背景，但非强制）。附录 A = 动态频谱；附录 B = 如何阅读模型图；附录 C = SDN 深入剖析；附录 D = NFV；附录 E = 你引用所依据的参考文献。

summary.en: Annex A (normative) — Dynamic spectrum management: how an access network borrows authorized spectrum safely
summary.zh: 附录 A（规范性）——动态频谱管理：接入网如何安全地借用授权频谱

blocks.en: Annex A is the standard's one normative enhancement. A.1 covers dynamic spectrum management — operating in unlicensed bands (e.g., the 2.4 GHz Industrial-Scientific-Medical (ISM) band, 5 GHz) or in Television White Space (TVWS), locally unused TV spectrum granted via a spectrum database. A.1.2 assigns roles: the Terminal (TE) reports scan and geolocation results; the NA senses neighbors and acts for a central manager; the ANC hosts the spectrum-management function and talks to the CIS; the CIS supplies authorized bands, channels, and max Equivalent Isotropic Radiated Power (EIRP). A.1.3 gives the reconfiguration-on-expiry use case. A.1.4 lists functional requirements: mutual authentication between ANC and CIS, dynamic spectrum allocation (no available TVWS channel means the NA radio stays off), and access-network shutdown when a primary user reclaims the band. A.1.5 defines attributes (Geolocation, spectrum-sensing statistics, OfferedChannels, BackUpChannels). A.1.6 specifies functions: CIS discovery and mutual authentication, querying authorized spectrum, and operating in it — all over the R10 reference point. A.1.7 details the procedures: access-network setup (with an Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP) exchange and a Pairwise Master Key delivered to the ANC), primary-service protection via a channel-switch handshake, and renewal before authorization expires. A.1.7.4 maps this onto IEEE 802 technologies — IEEE Std 802.22 is built for TVWS, and IEEE 802.11 added a TVWS mode.
blocks.zh: 附录 A 是本标准唯一的规范性增强。A.1 讲述动态频谱管理——在免许可频段（如 2.4 GHz 工业-科学-医疗（ISM，Industrial-Scientific-Medical）频段、5 GHz）或电视空白频段（TVWS，Television White Space，本地暂未使用、经频谱数据库授权使用的电视频谱）中运行。A.1.2 分配角色：终端（TE）上报扫描与地理位置结果；NA 感知邻居并代表中央管理者行事；ANC 承载频谱管理功能并与 CIS 通信；CIS 提供授权频段、信道及最大等效全向辐射功率（EIRP，Equivalent Isotropic Radiated Power）。A.1.3 给出授权到期后重配置的用例。A.1.4 列出功能需求：ANC 与 CIS 间的双向认证、动态频谱分配（无可用 TVWS 信道则 NA 射频保持关闭），以及主用户重新占用频段时关闭接入网。A.1.5 定义属性（地理位置、频谱感知统计、可用信道列表、备用信道列表）。A.1.6 规定功能：CIS 发现与双向认证、查询授权频谱以及在其中运行——均经 R10 参考点完成。A.1.7 详述流程：接入网建立（含可扩展认证协议（EAP，Extensible Authentication Protocol）交互，并向 ANC 交付成对主密钥）、通过信道切换握手保护主业务，以及授权到期前的续期。A.1.7.4 将其映射到 IEEE 802 技术——IEEE Std 802.22 专为 TVWS 设计，IEEE 802.11 增加了 TVWS 模式。

summary.en: Annex B (informative) — How to read the information-model diagrams (class, aggregation, composition, inheritance)
summary.zh: 附录 B（资料性）——如何阅读信息模型图（类、聚合、组合、继承）

blocks.en: Annex B is the legend for every figure in Clause 7.2. B.1 (Information element) shows the class notation: a class name, a list of attributes (each marked with cardinality like {1} or {0+}), and a list of functions that return a result. B.2 (Aggregation) explains the framed-diamond symbol on the "whole" end — a part-to-whole relationship where the part's life cycle is independent of the whole (it survives if the whole dissolves); a framed arrow toward the part marks a unidirectional association. B.3 (Composition) uses a filled diamond for a tight relationship — the part ceases to exist when the whole is dissolved. B.4 (Inheritance) uses a solid line with an unfilled arrowhead from child to parent, meaning the child adopts all of the parent's functionality and may add more; a child can inherit from multiple parents. With this legend, the dense session-model figures become readable maps rather than puzzles.
blocks.zh: 附录 B 是第 7.2 节每张图的图例。B.1（信息元素）展示类的表示法：一个类名、一组属性（每个标注基数，如 {1} 或 {0+}），以及一组返回结果值的函数。B.2（聚合）解释「整体」一端的带框菱形符号——一种部分对整体的关系，其中部分的生命周期独立于整体（整体被解散时部分仍存续）；指向部分的带框箭头表示单向关联。B.3（组合）用实心菱形表示紧密关系——整体被解散时部分随之消亡。B.4（继承）用从子到父、带空心箭头的实线表示，意为子继承父的全部功能并可追加；一个子可继承自多个父。有了这套图例，密集的会话模型图便从难题变成了可读的地图。

summary.en: Annex C (informative) — SDN functional decomposition: control/data plane split, OpenFlow, NETCONF/YANG, and 13 use cases
summary.zh: 附录 C（资料性）——SDN 功能分解：控制面/数据面分离、OpenFlow、NETCONF/YANG 及 13 个用例

blocks.en: Annex C is the longest annex and the deep-dive on SDN. C.1 (Introduction) gives SDN's two defining characteristics: separating the control plane (decides how to handle traffic) from the data plane (forwards traffic), and consolidating control so one software program drives many dataplane elements via a well-defined Application Programming Interface (API). The generic architecture (C.1.2) has a southbound interface (controller to switches, also called D-CPI) and a northbound interface (apps to controller, A-CPI, often a Representational State Transfer (REST) API). C.1.3 covers the Open Networking Foundation OpenFlow protocol and its 5C principles, plus Flow Entries, Match Fields, and Instructions stored in Flow Tables. C.1.4 discusses SDN for radio access networks. C.2 (Roles and identifiers) defines controller and datapath element. C.3 (NETCONF and YANG) presents the Network Configuration Protocol and the YANG data-modeling language as a programmatic alternative to brittle command-line configuration. C.4 lists thirteen use cases (interface/node setup, terminal-attachment detection, datapath establishment/maintenance/relocation/teardown, control-path maintenance, affecting the CIS, access-router connection, event handling, statistics gathering, and triggering technology-specific features). C.5 enumerates SDN-specific attributes, and C.6 gives detailed procedures — a simple SDN learning switch and an SDN-based WLAN controller that steers a station between access points using IEEE 802.11k/v/r neighbor reports and fast BSS transition.
blocks.zh: 附录 C 是最长的附录，也是对 SDN 的深入剖析。C.1（引言）给出 SDN 的两个本质特征：将控制面（决定如何处理流量）与数据面（转发流量）分离，并集中控制，使一个软件程序经由定义良好的应用编程接口（API，Application Programming Interface）驱动众多数据面元素。通用架构（C.1.2）含南向接口（控制器到交换机，又称 D-CPI）与北向接口（应用到控制器，A-CPI，常为表述性状态转移（REST，Representational State Transfer）API）。C.1.3 介绍开放网络基金会的 OpenFlow 协议及其 5C 原则，以及存于流表中的流表项、匹配字段和指令。C.1.4 讨论用于无线接入网的 SDN。C.2（角色与标识）定义控制器与数据面元素。C.3（NETCONF 与 YANG）将网络配置协议（NETCONF）与 YANG 数据建模语言作为脆弱命令行配置的可编程替代方案加以阐述。C.4 列出十三个用例（接口/节点建立、终端接入检测、数据通路的建立/维护/重定位/拆除、控制通路维护、影响 CIS、接入路由器连接、事件处理、统计采集，以及触发技术特定功能）。C.5 列举 SDN 特定属性，C.6 给出详细流程——一个简单的 SDN 学习型交换机，以及一个基于 SDN 的 WLAN 控制器，它利用 IEEE 802.11k/v/r 邻居报告与快速 BSS 切换在多个接入点之间引导站点。

summary.en: Annex D (informative) — NFV: decoupling network functions from hardware and slicing the access network
summary.zh: 附录 D（资料性）——NFV：将网络功能与硬件解耦并对接入网进行切片

blocks.en: Annex D explains Network Function Virtualization. D.1 (General) frames NFV as virtualizing entire network nodes into software building blocks; combined with SDN it lets operators run access networks on a hardware Cloud platform as if dedicated. D.2 (Basic concepts) defines the two layers: the NFV Infrastructure (NFVI) layer represents the underlying physical access-network hardware, and the Virtualized Network Function (VNF) layer abstracts the functions of the NA, ANC, and backhaul into a generic interface so the NMS can manage them via reference point R11. D.3 (VNFs of IEEE 802 access networks) shows the protocol model: VNFs sit above NFVI and provide network-configuration functions, fault-and-diagnosis (FMD) functions, and datapath-control functions, all coordinated by NFV Management and Orchestration (NFV-MANO). D.4 (Deployment considerations) introduces network slicing — multiple operators share one infrastructure, each on its own slice with its own NMS and Subscription Service (SS), while NFV-MANO dynamically rebalances physical resources to demand.
blocks.zh: 附录 D 阐述网络功能虚拟化。D.1（概述）将 NFV 描述为把整个网络节点虚拟化为软件构件；与 SDN 结合后，运营商可在硬件云平台上运行接入网，如同使用专用网络。D.2（基本概念）定义两个层：NFV 基础设施（NFVI，NFV Infrastructure）层代表底层物理接入网硬件，虚拟化网络功能（VNF）层将 NA、ANC 和回传的功能抽象为通用接口，使 NMS 能经由参考点 R11 进行管理。D.3（IEEE 802 接入网的 VNF）展示协议模型：VNF 位于 NFVI 之上，提供网络配置功能、故障与诊断（FMD）功能及数据通路控制功能，全部由 NFV 管理与编排（NFV-MANO，NFV Management and Orchestration）协调。D.4（部署考量）引入网络切片——多个运营商共享一套基础设施，各自占用拥有自己 NMS 与订阅服务（SS，Subscription Service）的切片，而 NFV-MANO 根据需求动态地重新平衡物理资源。

summary.en: Annex E (informative) — Bibliography: the external references behind softwarization
summary.zh: 附录 E（资料性）——参考文献：软件化背后的外部参考资料

blocks.en: Annex E is the Bibliography — informative references that provide helpful background but are not required to implement the recommended practice. It is where the concepts in Annexes C and D are sourced: ETSI's NFV Management and Orchestration ([B5]) anchors Annex D; the Open Networking Foundation's OpenFlow management/configuration spec ([B29]) and SDN Architecture ([B30]) anchor Annex C; IETF RFC 6241 ([B23]) is the NETCONF protocol; and a string of IEEE 802 references — 802.1Qca path control, 802.11k/v radio-measurement and network-management amendments, 802.21 Media Independent Services, 802.19.1 TVWS coexistence — back the cross-technology examples used throughout Clause 7's annexes. Because Annex E is informative, none of these are mandatory reading, but they are the trail to follow to go deeper than this recommended practice.
blocks.zh: 附录 E 是参考文献——资料性参考资料，提供有益背景，但实施本推荐规程并不需要。它是附录 C 与 D 中各概念的出处：ETSI 的 NFV 管理与编排（[B5]）支撑附录 D；开放网络基金会的 OpenFlow 管理/配置规范（[B29]）与 SDN 架构（[B30]）支撑附录 C；IETF RFC 6241（[B23]）即 NETCONF 协议；还有一系列 IEEE 802 参考——802.1Qca 路径控制、802.11k/v 无线测量与网络管理修正案、802.21 媒体无关服务、802.19.1 TVWS 共存——支撑第 7 章各附录中贯穿使用的跨技术示例。由于附录 E 是资料性的，这些均非必读，但它们是比本推荐规程更深入钻研的线索。

cites.note: 7.1 Introduction; 7.2.1-7.2.4 information models (session, AN configuration, network management)
7.3.1-7.3.5 virtualized network instantiation: general, roles, use cases, functional requirements, procedures
